text:
IBM worked on the design and deployment of a formalized, end-to-end workflow and case management solution that replaced the current manual, spreadsheet-based processes. This new system enabled real-time tracking, operational control, and governance of remediation activities, while supporting multiple outreach and data enrichment channels such as third-party services and relationship managers.  
The Business is now empowered to make timely, risk-informed decisions to retain, block, or exit customers based on their financial crime risk profile.   This also improved operational efficiency, data integrity, and strategic decision-making across the Business Savings portfolio.  
Results:  
- Replacement of manual process by end-to-end workflow and case management told reduce manual errors and increased operational efficiency
- Enhanced Regulatory Compliance and reduced exposure to financial crime
- Strategic decision making across the Business Savings portfolio
name: Chunk 2/2

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The selling organization responsible for designing and deploying the client's automated case management system. IBM led the end-to-end design and deployment effort to replace legacy manual workflows. This engagement positioned IBM as the primary technology and consulting partner for the financial institution's operational transformation.
context: IBM worked on the design and deployment of a formalized, end-to-end workflow and case management solution

raw_entities.name: The Business
raw_entities.description: An anonymized financial services client that required modernization of its customer risk management and remediation workflows. The organization faced operational inefficiencies and sought a formalized system to govern financial crime risk. Post-implementation, the client gained enhanced control over customer lifecycle decisions.
context: The Business is now empowered to make timely, risk-informed decisions
across the Business Savings portfolio

raw_entities.name: Business Savings portfolio
raw_entities.description: A specific business unit or client segment within the financial institution where strategic and operational improvements were realized. The portfolio served as the primary scope for the workflow modernization initiative. Decision-making and risk governance were specifically optimized for this segment.
context: across the Business Savings portfolio
Strategic decision making across the Business Savings portfolio

raw_entities.name: End-to-End Workflow and Case Management Solution
raw_entities.description: A comprehensive, automated system designed to replace manual, spreadsheet-driven processes with structured digital workflows. The solution provides real-time tracking, operational control, and governance for remediation activities. It serves as the central platform for managing customer risk and compliance operations.
context: formalized, end-to-end workflow and case management solution
This new system enabled real-time tracking, operational control, and governance

raw_entities.name: Manual Spreadsheet-Based Processes
raw_entities.description: The client's pre-existing reliance on manual, unstructured workflows that caused operational bottlenecks and data quality issues. These legacy processes lacked real-time visibility and centralized governance. The solution was specifically deployed to eliminate these constraints and automate case management.
context: replaced the current manual, spreadsheet-based processes
Replacement of manual process by end-to-end workflow

raw_entities.name: Real-Time Tracking
raw_entities.description: The system's capability to monitor and update remediation activities and customer statuses instantly. This feature provides immediate visibility into operational workflows and case progress. It enables business users to respond quickly to emerging risk indicators.
context: enabled real-time tracking, operational control, and governance
real-time tracking, operational control, and governance of remediation activities

raw_entities.name: Operational Control
raw_entities.description: The ability to manage, direct, and oversee business processes with structured governance and oversight. This capability ensures that remediation activities follow standardized protocols and compliance requirements. It reduces ad-hoc decision-making in favor of governed workflows.
context: operational control, and governance of remediation activities
operational control, and governance

raw_entities.name: Governance of Remediation Activities
raw_entities.description: Structured oversight and management of customer remediation workflows to ensure compliance and standardized execution. This capability aligns operational actions with regulatory standards and internal risk policies. It provides an auditable trail for all customer-related decisions.
context: governance of remediation activities
governance of remediation activities

raw_entities.name: Data Enrichment
raw_entities.description: The capability to augment and enhance customer data through multiple outreach channels and external integrations. This function supports more accurate risk profiling and decision-making. It leverages third-party services to fill data gaps and improve client records.
context: supporting multiple outreach and data enrichment channels
data enrichment channels

raw_entities.name: Financial Crime Risk Profiling
raw_entities.description: The application of the solution to assess customer risk levels for financial crime and regulatory compliance. This use case enables the business to evaluate accounts against defined risk thresholds. It directly informs subsequent customer lifecycle actions and remediation steps.
context: based on their financial crime risk profile
financial crime risk profile

raw_entities.name: Customer Lifecycle Management
raw_entities.description: The operational scenario of managing customer relationships by deciding whether to retain, block, or exit accounts based on risk assessments. This use case addresses the need for timely, risk-informed decisions across the portfolio. It standardizes how the business interacts with high-risk or non-compliant customers.
context: decisions to retain, block, or exit customers
retain, block, or exit customers

raw_entities.name: Operational Efficiency
raw_entities.description: Measurable improvement in workflow speed and resource utilization achieved by replacing manual processes with an automated system. The solution eliminates redundant manual steps and streamlines case handling. This gain directly reduces processing time and operational overhead.
context: improved operational efficiency
increased operational efficiency

raw_entities.name: Data Integrity
raw_entities.description: Enhanced accuracy, consistency, and reliability of customer and transactional data within the business portfolio. The automated workflow enforces standardized data entry and validation rules. This improvement ensures that risk assessments and decisions are based on trustworthy information.
context: data integrity, and strategic decision-making
data integrity

raw_entities.name: Strategic Decision-Making
raw_entities.description: The ability to make timely, informed business choices regarding customer risk and portfolio management. The solution provides centralized visibility and analytics to support executive and operational planning. This benefit enables proactive rather than reactive portfolio management.
context: strategic decision-making across the Business Savings portfolio
Strategic decision making across the Business Savings portfolio

raw_entities.name: Enhanced Regulatory Compliance
raw_entities.description: Improved adherence to regulatory requirements and standards through structured workflows and automated case management. The system enforces compliance checkpoints and audit trails for all remediation activities. This achievement reduces the likelihood of regulatory penalties or findings.
context: Enhanced Regulatory Compliance and reduced exposure to financial crime
Enhanced Regulatory Compliance

raw_entities.name: Reduced Financial Crime Exposure
raw_entities.description: Lowered vulnerability to financial crimes and associated penalties through proactive risk profiling and automated remediation. The solution mitigates exposure by enabling faster identification and action on high-risk accounts. This risk reduction protects the business from reputational and financial damage.
context: reduced exposure to financial crime
exposure to financial crime

raw_entities.name: Third-Party Services
raw_entities.description: External data and service providers integrated into the solution to support outreach and data enrichment channels. These services augment the core platform with specialized data feeds and customer engagement tools. They enable the business to access external risk indicators and communication channels.
context: such as third-party services and relationship managers
third-party services
